rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §12.1202, which governs the composition of charter school governing bodies.
quote: A majority of the members of the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school or the governing body of a charter holder must be qualified voters.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns charter school governance, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
